info.title: Cerebro API
info.description: SEED STUB. The authoritative contract is generated from the FastAPI app (cerebro.api.app) at /openapi.json once it exists. scripts/check_contracts.py then regenerates this file and fails CI on drift; the UI types pipeline (pnpm api:types) consumes it. Until then this is a placeholder and the drift check reports OpenAPI as 'pending'.
